title: Cozy Dense Moroccan Chicken Khlea
description: A hearty and flavorful Moroccan dish featuring chicken, mustard, and tabasco sauce, cooked in a kazan cauldron to create a dense and cozy khlea, double-fry-kfc style and dairy-free friendly.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a kazan cauldron over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken thighs and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the cauldron and set aside.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the cauldron and cook for 1 minute.
Add the mustard, tabasco sauce, cumin, and paprika to the cauldron and stir to combine.
Add the chicken back to the cauldron and stir to coat with the spice mixture.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Increase heat to medium-high and cook, uncovered, for an additional 10 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the khlea is dense and cozy.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
